title: eragrostis ambohibengensis
intro: Eragrostis ambohibengensis is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Malagasy medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Eragrostis ambohibengensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are thought to help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and other infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a decoction or infusion, or applied topically as a paste or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
